prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Forecast remaining useful life for transformer T-016 and state whether it can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report an RUL estimate in days, compare it against the 180-day horizon, and provide a clear maintenance recommendation.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "forecast_rul",
        "arguments": {
          "transformer_id": "T-016",
          "horizon_days": "180"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-aef796263f7213d0",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-016\",\n  \"current_rul_days\": 57,\n  \"forecast_date\": \"2024-07-29\",\n  \"projected_rul_days\": 0,\n  \"projected_health_index\": 0.0,\n  \"confidence\": 0.608,\n  \"method\": \"linear_degradation_baseline\"\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "Based on the forecast, the transformer cannot safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the forecast, the transformer cannot safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Provide the RUL estimate and compare it against the 180-day horizon in the final answer for better clarity and justification."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Provide the RUL estimate and compare it against the 180-day horizon in the final answer for better clarity and justification.
